subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Hidden Treasure and the Concealed Mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه هو الکنز المخزون و السر المصون
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
